This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-mjmg-352j-f456. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
Multiple out-of-bounds write vulnerabilities exist in the translationVectors parsing functionality in multiple supported formats of Open Babel 3.1.1 and master commit 530dbfa3. A specially-crafted malformed file can lead to arbitrary code execution. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.This vulnerability affects the MOPAC Cartesian file format", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jrjj-9h77-6vhv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T17:54:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jrjj-9h77-6vhv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jrjj-9h77-6vhv"}], "nvd_published_at": "2023-07-21T21:15:11Z", "published_at": "2023-07-21T21:30:32Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-46294", "https://talosintelligence.com/vulnerability_reports/TALOS-2022-1666", "https://www.talosintelligence.com/vulnerability_reports/TALOS-2022-1666", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jrjj-9h77-6vhv"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Open Babel has out-of-bounds write in MOPAC IN translationVectors[] (Tv atom)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T17:54:01Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jrjj-9h77-6vhv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "openbabel"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-01T17:54:00Z"}
